headline: Texas Pacific Land Pivot Highlights Valuation Tension And Insider Confidence
summary: Texas Pacific Land (NYSE:TPL) is moving into data center and power generation development on its vast land holdings. Horizon Kinetics Asset Management has been accumulating additional shares, increasing its insider ownership stake. These moves come as investor interest in the company strengthens across different investor types. For a company long associated with oil, gas, and water royalties, NYSE:TPL is entering a new phase that puts more of its land to work. Shares recently traded at...

headline: A Look At Texas Pacific Land (TPL) Valuation After Strong Recent Share Price Momentum
summary: Texas Pacific Land stock: quick snapshot Texas Pacific Land (TPL) has drawn attention after strong recent share price moves, with the stock up about 59% over the past month and roughly 75% in the past 3 months. See our latest analysis for Texas Pacific Land. Those sharp recent share price gains sit on top of a much longer run, with Texas Pacific Land showing a 79.9% year to date share price return and a 5 year total shareholder return of 277.0%. This suggests momentum has been building over...
